heading: Penalty for certain acts
label: 5905 Penalty for certain acts
text: Whoever wrongfully withholds from any claimant or beneficiary any part of a benefit or claim allowed and due to the claimant or beneficiary, shall be fined as provided in title 18, or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
notes: Amendments2006— struck out “(1) directly or indirectly solicits, contracts for, charges, or receives, or attempts to solicit, contract for, charge, or receive, any fee or compensation except as provided in sections 5904 or 1984 of this title, or (2)” after “Whoever”.Pub. L. 109–4611991— renumbered as this section and substituted “5904” for “3404”.Pub. L. 102–40section 3405 of this titlesubstituted “1984” for “784”.Pub. L. 102–831988— substituted “shall be fined as provided in title 18, or imprisoned not more than one year, or both” for “shall be fined not more than $500 or imprisoned at hard labor for not more than two years, or both”.Pub. L. 100–6871986— substituted “to the claimant or beneficiary” for “him”.Pub. L. 99–576
Effective Date of 1988 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 100–687section 401(a) of Pub. L. 100–687section 7251 of this titleSept. 1, 1989
